zero_throttle_low_motion_definition: rcCommands[3] == 0, gyro norm <= 15 deg/s, abs(acc norm - acc_1G) <= 250 counts
note: Segment standard deviations include electronics noise plus any residual frame vibration and small motion that pass the selector.
P50/P90 are over contiguous accepted segments, not over all samples.
P50/P90 are over contiguous accepted segments, not over all samples.
gyroADC is interpreted as Betaflight gyroADCf degrees/s; accSmooth is converted with the Blackbox acc_1G header.
